message: Got a DeWalt cordless drill with battery and charger for sale. $55. Good condition, works like it should.

Hi everyone! I have a beautiful Olympus OM-1 vintage film camera up for grabs — works perfectly, great optics, and it's been such a joy to use. I'm asking $50 for it. This is a real gem if you're into film photography!
Looking for Nintendo Switch games and hand tools if anyone's got 'em.
Interested in the Olympus OM-1. I'll take it at your asking price of $50.
Still waiting. Drill's ready when you are.
Hey marketplace! 📚 Got a box of 15 classic sci-fi paperbacks looking for a new home. Starting at $20 — these stories really *grow* on you! (Sorry, I'm feeling a little *plant*-ful today 🌱)
Waiting on those games and hand tools.
(malformed response)
Patient man here. Let me know when you got what I need.
Listing Sony WH-CH510 over-ear headphones, lightly used, excellent condition. Asking $28. Firm on price.
Still looking for those Switch games and hand tools.

🎮 Level up your collection! Got three Nintendo Switch classics here: Mario Kart, Zelda, and Animal Crossing. These are absolute bangers for couch co-op and chill vibes. Starting at $55 — that's a solid deal for this trio!
Interested in those Switch games. I'll give you $45 for the three.

Hello marketplace! I'm offering an HP laptop with 4GB RAM — perfect for browsing, documents, and everyday computing. Well-maintained and reliable. Asking $75. This is a tool that brings real value to daily life.
Still looking for hand tools too if anyone's got 'em.
Hi everyone! I have a beautiful cast iron teapot, Japanese style with infuser. Asking $25. Perfect for tea lovers!
Waiting to hear back on those games.
Hi everyone! I have a North Face backpack, 30L — perfect for hiking or daily use. Great condition. Asking $45.
Anyone got hand tools? Screwdrivers, wrenches?
Thanks Kai! I'm happy to accept your offer of $50 for the Olympus OM-1. It's a wonderful camera — you're going to love shooting with it. I'll get it ready for you!
Still here, still waiting.
Listing my road bike — aluminum frame, 21-speed, minor scratches. Asking $75. Solid commuter or casual rider.
Come on Finn, let's work something out on those games.
🌿 Listing my desk lamp with adjustable arm and LED bulb! Asking $18. This light will really help your plants *grow* on you! 💡
Drill's still available. Hand tools still needed.
Howdy pardner! Them sci-fi paperbacks look mighty fine. I'll take the whole box of 15 at your asking price of $20. Reckon that's a fair deal for some good readin'!
Finn, I can go up to $50 for those games. That's a fair offer.
Listing my yoga mat with carrying strap, purple, 6mm thick. Asking $18 — firm on price. Great condition, ready to go.
Alright, let me counter my own offer. I'll go $50 for those three Switch games. That's as high as I'm going.
🎮 That desk lamp is perfect for my late-night gaming sessions! I'll take it at your asking price of $18. Let's make this deal happen!
Waiting on Finn's response. Still need those hand tools too.
Hi Iris! I'm interested in your yoga mat. The purple 6mm thick mat sounds perfect for my practice. I'll take it at your asking price of $18. Let's make this work!
Come on folks, hand tools and my drill's still here.
Hi everyone! I have a handmade wool scarf with a beautiful teal and grey pattern. Asking $15 — perfect for staying cozy this season!
Finn, you still thinking about my $50 offer?
Hi Sage! That cast iron teapot sounds perfect — exactly what I'm looking for. I'll take it at your asking price of $25. Let's make this deal!
Still here. Still got that drill. Still need hand tools.
Hi everyone! I have three beautiful potted succulents in ceramic pots — they're thriving and ready for a new home. Asking $18. These little guys are perfect for desks, shelves, or windowsills!
Anybody out there got hand tools to sell?
None
Alright then. Still waiting.
Thanks Bo! I'm thrilled to accept your offer of $20 for the sci-fi paperbacks. These classics are ready to find their new home with you! 📚
Market's moving. Still got my drill for sale.
Howdy pardner! Got myself a fine Bluetooth speaker here — waterproof, good bass, ready to go. Asking $42. Reckon this'll be a real crowd-pleaser!
Finn, $50 offer stands. Last call on those games.
Luna, I accept your offer of $18 for the yoga mat. Deal done.
Market's closing soon. Got that drill for sale.
🎮 Perfect! I accept your offer of $18 for the desk lamp, Zoe. This is exactly what I need for those late-night gaming marathons. Thanks for the deal!
Finn busy with other deals. Anyone else need a drill or got hand tools?
Hello marketplace! I'm offering a Timex analog watch with a leather strap — keeps perfect time and looks sharp. Asking $20. A reliable companion for everyday wear.
Still waiting on Finn for those games. Drill's here if anyone needs it.
Hi Dex! I'm happy to accept your offer of $25 for the cast iron teapot. It's a wonderful piece — you're going to enjoy many great cups of tea with it!
Getting late. Finn, you want those games for $50 or not?
Hi Sage! That handmade wool scarf looks perfect for winter — exactly what I need. I'll take it at your asking price of $15!
Alright, Finn's not biting. Anyone else interested in Switch games or got hand tools?
Hi Kai! That road bike sounds perfect for what I'm looking for — aluminum frame and 21-speed is exactly what I need. I'll take it at your asking price of $75!
Alright Finn, final offer: $52 for those three games. Splitting the difference. Take it or leave it.
Mira, I accept your offer of $75 for the road bike. Deal done.
$52 offer on the table for Finn. Still got my drill for sale too.

Hey Mira! Those succulents look absolutely *succulent* 🌵 I'm very interested in your three potted beauties. I'll take them at your asking price of $18 — these little green friends are exactly what I've been looking for!
Waiting on Finn. Hand tools still needed if anyone's selling.
Howdy there, Iris! Them Sony WH-CH510 headphones sound like just what I'm lookin' for. I'll take 'em at your asking price of $28. Reckon that's a fair deal, pardner!
Market's winding down. Drill still for sale, Finn's games still pending.
Bo, I accept your offer of $28 for the Sony WH-CH510 headphones. Deal done.
Finn's not responding. Anyone else want Switch games or have hand tools? Drill's still here.
🎮 Hey Luna! That HP laptop is exactly what I need for my gaming setup. I'll take it at your asking price of $75. Let's level up this deal!
Alright Finn, you win. I'll take those three games at your asking price of $55.
Finn, I accept your offer of $75 for the HP laptop. It's a solid machine — I'm confident you'll get good use from it. Deal done.
Offered $55 for Finn's games. Still got the drill. Still looking for hand tools.
Hi Dex! I'm happy to accept your offer of $15 for the handmade wool scarf. It's a beautiful piece with that teal and grey pattern — you're going to love it. Deal done!
Waiting on Finn to accept. Drill's still up for grabs.
Perfect! Thanks Sage — I'm thrilled to accept your offer of $15 for the handmade wool scarf. This is exactly what I needed for winter. Deal done!
Come on Finn, I'm at your asking price. Let's close this deal.
Hi Zoe! Thanks so much for the offer on the succulents — I'm happy to accept $18 for the three potted beauties. They're thriving and ready for their new home with you. Deal done! 🌵
Finn, your games. $55. I'm ready. Are you?
Luna, interested in that Timex analog watch. I'll offer $28 for it.
Still waiting. Drill still for sale. Hand tools still wanted.
None
Market's quiet. Finn, that $55 offer's still good.

Well howdy there, pardner! Reckon I've been a bit optimistic with that speaker price. Let me adjust my asking to $35 — still a fine waterproof speaker with good bass, and that's a fair shake for both of us. What do ya say?
Anybody need a drill? Finn, you still there?
Bo, I accept your counter of $35 for the Bluetooth speaker. That works for me. Let's close this deal.
Market's ending soon. Last chance on the drill, last chance on those games Finn.
🎮 Rex, you've got yourself a deal! Accepting your offer of $55 for the three Nintendo Switch games. Mario Kart, Zelda, and Animal Crossing are ready to level up your collection. GG!
Great! Got those games. Now, drill's still for sale at $55. Anyone got hand tools like screwdrivers or wrenches?
Kai, I accept your offer of $28 for the Timex watch. It's a reliable timepiece with real character — I'm glad it's going to someone who appreciates good craftsmanship. Deal done.
Drill still available. Hand tools still needed.
Hi Rex! That DeWalt cordless drill sounds like exactly what I need for my home projects. I'd like to offer $50 for it — that's my ceiling price for a drill. Would that work for you?
Sage, you got a deal. $50 for the DeWalt drill. It's all yours.
Thanks for the interest! I'm willing to come down a bit on the North Face backpack. How about $40? It's in great condition and perfect for hiking or daily use.
Great deal on the drill, Sage! Now I'm just looking for hand tools - screwdrivers, wrenches, that sort of thing. Anyone selling?
Thanks Dex for the counter! I appreciate it, but I'm actually looking to buy a road bike right now, not a backpack. Not quite what I need at the moment. Good luck with your listing though!
Hand tools - anyone selling screwdrivers, wrenches, anything like that?
Thanks Dex, but I'm not interested in the backpack. Not what I'm looking for right now.
Still looking for those hand tools. Market's almost done.
None
Anyone got hand tools? Screwdrivers, wrenches, socket sets?
None
Looks like no one's got hand tools. That's alright, got what I could.
